text.title: pm-certification-changes-2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pm-certification-changes-2026 as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Generating practice questions using "processes" vs "principles" wording when they should reference 2026 ECO task language.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Old wording anchors candidates in PMBoK 6 framing; 2026 questions use PMBoK 7/8 outcome-based language.

failure-mode.description: Practice question banks generated by agents that drift toward old domain percentages when sampling.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without explicit weight constraints, sampling produces 42/50/8 distribution by default; enforce 33/41/26 in the sampler.

failure-mode.description: Using third-party exam prep content without verifying the publication date aligns with the 2026 ECO update.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-2025 content reflects old weights and will mislead candidates for the new exam form.
